title: Site Arrival Points
text: At least one accessible route shall be provided within the site from accessible parking spaces and accessible passenger loading zones; public streets and sidewalks; and public transportation stops to the accessible building or facility entrance they serve.

title: Public Entrances
text: In addition to entrances required by sections 206.4.2 through 206.4.9, at least 60 percent of all public entrances shall comply with accessible route requirements.

title: Minimum Number of Accessible Parking Spaces
text: Accessible parking spaces shall be provided in the number from Table 208.2: 1 to 25 total = 1 accessible; 26-50 = 2; 51-75 = 3; 76-100 = 4; 101-150 = 5; 151-200 = 6; 201-300 = 7; 301-400 = 8; 401-500 = 9; 501-1000 = 2% of total; over 1000 = 20 plus 1 for each 100 over 1000. For every 6 or fraction of 6 accessible spaces, at least 1 shall be van accessible.

title: Accessible Route Components
text: Accessible routes shall consist of walking surfaces with a running slope not steeper than 1:20, doorways, ramps, curb ramps excluding the flared sides, elevators, and platform lifts. All components of an accessible route shall comply with applicable sections of Chapter 4.

title: Clear Width of Walking Surfaces
text: Except as provided in 403.5.2 and 403.5.3, the clear width of walking surfaces shall be 36 inches (915 mm) minimum. The clear width shall be permitted to be reduced to 32 inches (815 mm) minimum for a length of 24 inches (610 mm) maximum provided that reduced width segments are separated by segments that are 48 inches (1220 mm) long minimum and 36 inches (915 mm) wide minimum.

title: Door Clear Width
text: Door openings shall provide a clear width of 32 inches (815 mm) minimum. Clear openings of doorways with swinging doors shall be measured between the face of the door and the stop, with the door open 90 degrees. Openings more than 24 inches (610 mm) deep shall provide a clear opening of 36 inches (915 mm) minimum.

title: Maneuvering Clearances at Manual Swinging Doors
text: Minimum maneuvering clearances at swinging doors and gates without closers shall comply with Table 404.2.4.1. Front approach pull side: 60 in deep x 18 in beyond latch. Front approach push side: 48 in deep, no side requirement (60 in if door has closer and latch).

title: Ramp Slope
text: Ramp runs shall have a running slope not steeper than 1:12. Cross slope of ramp runs shall not be steeper than 1:48.

title: Ramp Clear Width
text: The clear width of a ramp run and, where handrails are provided, the clear width between handrails shall be 36 inches (915 mm) minimum.

title: Ramp Rise
text: The rise for any ramp run shall be 30 inches (760 mm) maximum.

title: Ramp Landings
text: Ramps shall have landings at the top and the bottom of each ramp run. The landing clear width shall be at least as wide as the widest ramp run leading to the landing. The landing clear length shall be 60 inches (1525 mm) long minimum. Where ramps change direction at landings, the clear landing size shall be 60 inches (1525 mm) minimum by 60 inches (1525 mm) minimum.

title: Stair Treads and Risers
text: All steps on a flight of stairs shall have uniform riser heights and uniform tread depths. Risers shall be 4 inches (100 mm) high minimum and 7 inches (180 mm) high maximum. Treads shall be 11 inches (280 mm) deep minimum.

title: Handrail Height
text: Top of gripping surfaces of handrails shall be 34 inches (865 mm) minimum and 38 inches (965 mm) maximum vertically above walking surfaces, stair nosings, and ramp surfaces.

title: Toilet Room Turning Space
text: Turning space complying with 304 shall be provided within the toilet room. Required: 60 inch (1525 mm) diameter circular space, or T-shaped turning space within a 60 inch (1525 mm) square.

title: Water Closet Clearance
text: Clearance around a water closet shall be 60 inches (1525 mm) minimum measured perpendicular from the side wall and 56 inches (1420 mm) minimum measured perpendicular from the rear wall.

title: Grab Bars at Water Closets
text: Grab bars for water closets shall be provided on the side wall closest to the water closet and on the rear wall. Side wall grab bar: 42 in (1065 mm) long minimum, located 12 in (305 mm) max from the rear wall, extending 54 in (1370 mm) min from the rear wall. Rear wall grab bar: 36 in (915 mm) long minimum.

title: Raised Characters
text: Signs identifying permanent rooms and spaces shall have raised characters and braille. Characters shall be 1/32 inch (0.8 mm) minimum raised above background, sans serif, uppercase, between 5/8 inch (16 mm) and 2 inches (51 mm) high based on viewing distance.
